test.create_query: CREATE TABLE permute_cache_wide ( service String, trace_id String, span_id String, timestamp DateTime64(6), parent_span_id String, operation String, duration_us UInt64, status_code UInt8, INDEX idx_service (service) TYPE bloom_filter, INDEX idx_trace (trace_id) TYPE bloom_filter, INDEX idx_span (span_id) TYPE bloom_filter, INDEX idx_ts (timestamp) TYPE minmax ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (service, trace_id, span_id, timestamp) SETTINGS min_rows_for_wide_part = 0, min_bytes_for_wide_part = 0

CREATE TABLE permute_cache_src ( service String, trace_id String, span_id String, timestamp DateTime64(6), parent_span_id String, operation String, duration_us UInt64, status_code UInt8 ) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO permute_cache_src SELECT hex(sipHash128(number, 0)), hex(sipHash128(number, 1)), hex(sipHash128(number, 2)), toDateTime64('2024-01-01', 6) + number / 1000000, hex(sipHash128(number, 3)), randomPrintableASCII(32), rand64() % 10000000, rand() % 3 FROM numbers(5000000)
test.query: INSERT INTO permute_cache_wide SELECT * FROM permute_cache_src
